construction.panels: Standard baseball jersey construction with set-in short sleeves. White piping forms a V-shape across the chest and extends down the full-button placket.
construction.closures: Full-button front closure with 7 white, round, flat buttons.
construction.details: V-neck collar. Short sleeves with double white stripe trim on the cuffs. Straight hem.

graphics.location: Arched across the front chest, above the button placket.
graphics.size: Approximately 14 inches wide and 4 inches tall at its highest point.
graphics.style: Flat, slightly raised appliqué with a clean edge.

branding.primary_logo: Small woven label at the interior back neck, featuring a purple background with a yellow/gold rose graphic and 'SkyyRose' text (text not fully legible).
branding.secondary_marks: Rectangular woven patch on the lower front right side (when worn), featuring a brown/tan background with a baseball bat/ball graphic, 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' text, and smaller illegible text below. A small white care/size tag is visible directly below this patch.

fabric_appearance: Performance jersey knit with a subtle sheen, appearing to have a fine mesh texture.
unique_features: Prominent 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' graphic. Custom 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' woven patch with baseball motif.
collection_aesthetic: Oakland luxury streetwear, blending athletic wear with a powerful social statement. Reflects emotional expression and a 'dark luxury' vibe through its color palette and collection name.
